name: Replit Slides Deck
usage: 【模板: Replit Slides Style Deck】 Replit Slides 八套主题 (helix/holm/vance/bevel/world/atlas/bluehouse)
trigger_terms: Replit Slides 八套主题之一
best_for: Requests that need presentation and deck-style storytelling.
Use when the user asks for Replit Slides 风 Deck.
avoid_for: Requests unrelated to this template category or scenario.
Cases where the user explicitly asks for a different medium, layout, or visual style.
layout_rules: 【意图】Replit Slides 风的单文件 horizontal-swipe deck, 选 1 套主题不混用。
style_rules: 每套主题有完整调色板 + 字体 + accent, 不要混用
content_rules: Cover + agenda + N 个 content + 收尾 (N 由【用户内容】长度决定, 完整覆盖每个要点; 短内容 6-10 起步, 长内容应更多)
每套主题有完整调色板 + 字体 + accent, 不要混用
Pick one theme: helix / holm / vance / bevel / world-dark / world-mint / atlas / bluehouse

quality_checks: Use the reference HTML as a style and structure guide, not as final placeholder content.
Preserve user-provided facts, numbers, dates, and claims.
Return one complete standalone HTML file with no markdown wrapper.
Keep visible text readable and avoid overlapping UI or content blocks.
